verses.latin_vulgate: Canticum graduum.   Levavi oculos meos in montes,  unde veniet auxilium mihi.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֗יר לַֽמַּ֫עֲל֥וֹת אֶשָּׂ֣א עֵ֭ינַי אֶל־הֶהָרִ֑ים מֵ֝אַ֗יִן יָבֹ֥א עֶזְרִֽי׃
verses.douay_rheims: I have lifted up my eyes to the mountains, from whence help shall come to me.
verses.finnish_biblia: Veisu korkeimmassa Kuorissa. Minä nostan silmäni mäkiin päin, joista minulle apu tulee.
verses.king_james: I will lift up mine eyes unto the hills, from whence cometh my help.

verses.latin_vulgate: Auxilium meum a Domino,  qui fecit cælum et terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: עֶ֭זְרִי מֵעִ֣ם יְהֹוָ֑ה עֹ֝שֵׂ֗ה שָׁמַ֥יִם וָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.douay_rheims: My help is from the Lord, who made heaven and earth.
verses.finnish_biblia: Minun apuni tulee Herralta, joka taivaan ja maan tehnyt on.
verses.king_james: My help cometh from the Lord, which made heaven and earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Non det in commotionem pedem tuum,  neque dormitet qui custodit te.
verses.douay_rheims: May he not suffer thy foot to be moved: neither let him slumber that keepeth thee.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ei hän salli jalkas horjua; eikä se torku, joka sinua kätkee.
verses.king_james: He will not suffer thy foot to be moved: he that keepeth thee will not slumber.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ecce non dormitabit neque dormiet  qui custodit Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִנֵּ֣ה לֹֽא־יָ֭נוּם וְלֹ֣א יִישָׁ֑ן שׁ֝וֹמֵ֗ר יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.douay_rheims: Behold he shall neither slumber nor sleep, that keepeth Israel.
verses.finnish_biblia: Katso, joka Israelia varjelee, ei se torku eli makaa.
verses.king_james: Behold, he that keepeth Israel shall neither slumber nor sleep.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus custodit te ;  Dominus protectio tua super manum dexteram tuam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יְהֹוָ֥ה שֹׁמְרֶ֑ךָ יְהֹוָ֥ה צִ֝לְּךָ֗ עַל־יַ֥ד יְמִינֶֽךָ׃
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord is thy keeper, the Lord is thy protection upon thy right hand.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra kätkeköön sinua: Herra on sinun varjos, sinun oikialla kädelläs,
verses.king_james: The Lord is thy keeper: the Lord is thy shade upon thy right hand.

verses.latin_vulgate: Per diem sol non uret te,  neque luna per noctem.
verses.douay_rheims: The sun shall not burn thee by day: nor the moon by night.
verses.finnish_biblia: Ettei aurinko sinua polttaisi päivällä, eikä kuu yöllä.
verses.king_james: The sun shall not smite thee by day, nor the moon by night.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus custodit te ab omni malo ;  custodiat animam tuam Dominus.
verses.douay_rheims: The Lord keepeth thee from all evil: may the Lord keep thy soul.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra kätkeköön sinun kaikesta pahasta: hän kätkeköön sinun sielus!
verses.king_james: The Lord shall preserve thee from all evil: he shall preserve thy soul.

verses.latin_vulgate: Dominus custodiat introitum tuum et exitum tuum,  ex hoc nunc et usque in sæculum.
verses.douay_rheims: May the Lord keep thy coming in and thy going out; from henceforth now and for ever.
verses.finnish_biblia: Herra kätkeköön sinun uloskäymises ja sisällekäymises, hamasta nyt ja ijankaikkiseen!
verses.king_james: The Lord shall preserve thy going out and thy coming in from this time forth, and even for evermore.
